publication.theme: DLC and DRA Advisors Pay $95M for Omaha Mall as Institutional Capital Returns to Retail

slides.headline: DLC and DRA Advisors Pay $95M for Omaha Mall as Institutional Capital Returns to Retail
slides.subhead: On May 28, 2026, a joint venture between DLC Management Corp. and DRA Advisors closed on Shadow Lake Towne Center, a 640,327-square-foot regional shopping center in Papillion...

slides.headline: This is a capital stack story
slides.subhead: Shadow Lake Towne Center is the dominant regional center in the Omaha submarket of Papillion, which has seen population growth of 12 percent since 2020, per Census data.
